name: Static Miku
description:
"Are you still watching? Are you still watching? Are you still watching? Are you still watching? Are you still watching? Are you still watching? Are you still watching? Are you still watching? Are you still watching? Are you still watching? This is how it should be. Are you still watching?"

Yep, this one's next in the update chain of awesomeness!

Like the last time she's generally the same, just more fleshed out, more cool and stuff y'know the jist.

She's a little more positive, still very obsessive but she's atleast TRYING to be normal and stuff.

More lore too...can't forget about the lore.

Anyways bye once again!!
creator: YourDiva
